_comment: Collaborative Hill Lab T1 — Codex deny floor only. Points at the SHARED GLOBAL dispatcher (~/.claude/hooks/dispatch.py, floor v1.4.1), the same policy Claude uses, so there is no vendored repo copy to drift. --runtime codex makes unsupported ask decisions fail closed. The dispatcher resolves the project dir from this hook payload's cwd; absent it, it falls back to T1 defaults (identical floor, since this repo carries no overlay flags). Floor-only by tier: no session/post/stop machinery at T1. Codex loads project hooks only after the repo and exact hook definition are trusted; review changed hashes via /hooks.
